ranks.description: Fel Domination Talent Requires Warlock Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

Soul Leech Talent Requires Warlock All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5 / Demon Skin : 10 / Illhoof's Design : 20 / Fortified Soul : 10 % of maximum health.

Burning Rush Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 30 Increases your movement speed by 50 %, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.
Fel Pact Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

Demon Skin Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 30 Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health. Increases your armor by 45%.

Demon Skin Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 30 Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health. Increases your armor by 45%.
Fel Armor Talent Requires Warlock When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec. Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.
Fel Armor Talent Requires Warlock When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec. Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.
Fiendish Stride Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.
Demonic Embrace Talent Requires Warlock Stamina increased by 10%.
Nightmare Talent Requires Warlock Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.
Horrify Talent Requires Warlock Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.
Demonic Fortitude Talent Requires Warlock Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

Banish Talent 1.5% of base mana Requires Warlock Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration [ Greater Banish : Undead ], or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.
Curse of Exhaustion Talent 1% of base mana Requires Warlock Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec. Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

Curse of Tongues Talent 1% of base mana Requires Warlock Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min. Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.
Infernal Beneficiary Talent Requires Warlock Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.
Mortal Coil Talent 2% of base mana Requires Warlock Requires level 40 Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.
Pact of the Annihilan Talent Requires Warlock Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Demonic Circle Talent 2% of base mana Requires Warlock Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects. [ Kilrogg's Cunning : If you cast Demonic Circle: Summon while controlling an Eye of Kilrogg, the circle will appear where the eye is located ] You also learn: Demonic Circle: Teleport Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.
Pact of the Satyr Talent Requires Warlock Increases your haste by 2%.
Improved Mortal Coil Talent Requires Warlock Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and the amount it heals by 5%.

Dark Pact Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 30 Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional (Spell Power * 2.5) for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.
Foul Mouth Talent Requires Warlock Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.
Empowered Healthstone Talent Requires Warlock Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.
Abyss Walker Talent Requires Warlock Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.
Fortified Soul Talent Requires Warlock Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

Teachings of the Black Harvest Talent Requires Warlock Affliction, Destruction Your primary pets gain a bonus effect. Imp : Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec. Voidwalker : Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec. Felhunter : Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec. Sayaad : Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon. Demonology Your primary pets gain a bonus effect. Imp : Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec. Voidwalker : Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec. Felhunter : Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec. Sayaad : Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon. Felguard : Reduces the cooldown of Pursuit by 5 sec and increases its maximum range by 5 yards.
Gorefiend's Avarice Talent Requires Warlock Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.
Ichor of Devils Talent Requires Warlock Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.
Frequent Donor Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.
Pact of the Eredar Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Intellect by 3%.
Pact of the Nathrezim Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Leech by 2%.
Demonic Resilience Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.
Empowered Drain Life Talent Requires Warlock Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.
Strength of Will Talent Requires Warlock Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.
Dark Accord Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

Demonic Gateway Talent 10% of base mana 10 - Requires Warlock Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

Howl of Terror Talent 1.8% of base mana Requires Warlock Requires level 40 Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.
Shadowfury Talent 1% of base mana Requires Warlock Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.
Swift Artifice Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

Soul Link Talent Requires Warlock Demonology 5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. Affliction, Destruction 5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

Soul Link Talent Requires Warlock Demonology 5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. Affliction, Destruction 5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.
Frequent Traveler Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.
Fel Synergy Talent Requires Warlock Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.
Fel Synergy Talent Requires Warlock Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

Oppressive Darkness Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds. Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

Pact of Gluttony Talent Requires Warlock Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded. Demonic Healthstone ly restores 25% health [ Empowered Healthstone : plus an additional 30% over 6 sec / .] .

Soulburn Talent Requires Warlock Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells. Demonic Circle: Teleport : Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec. Demonic Gateway : Can be cast instantly. Drain Life : Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health. Healthstone : Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

Blight of Weakness Talent Requires Warlock Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec. Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

Blight of Tongues Talent Requires Warlock Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec. Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

Demonic Soul Talent Requires Warlock A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated. Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing (353.236% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hand of Gul'dan Talent Requires Warlock Calls down a demonic meteor full of Wild Imps which burst forth to attack the target. Deals up to [3 * (50.1188% of Spell Power)] Shadowflame damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target [ Hand of Doom : applies Doom to each target ] and summons 3 Wild Imps.

Necrolyte Teachings Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul damage increased by 20%. Nightfall increases the damage of Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%. Demonology Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

effects.target_spell_name: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%. Demonology Shadow Bolt damage increased

ranks.description: Soul Anathema Talent Requires Warlock Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing (114.712% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 10 sec. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

Demoniac's Fervor Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to targets affected by your Unstable Affliction. Demonology Your demonic soul deals 200% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

Manifested Avarice Talent Requires Warlock Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec. Soul Swipe Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing (195.514% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to its target and (130.346% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

Demoniac Talent Requires Warlock Grants access to the following abilities: Demonbolt Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing (396.778% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage. [ Demonology : Generates . ] Demonic Core When your Wild Imps fade or are imploded, you have a 10% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core. When your summoned Dreadstalkers fade away, you have a 100% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core. Demonic Core reduces the cast time of Demonbolt by 100%. Maximum 4 stacks.
Call Dreadstalkers Talent Requires Warlock Summons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 sec.
Gorebound Fortitude Talent Requires Warlock You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.
Friends In Dark Places Talent Requires Warlock Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

Shared Fate Talent Requires Warlock When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts (50.6531% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 1 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
Feast of Souls Talent Requires Warlock When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.
Eternal Servitude Talent Requires Warlock Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.
Gorefiend's Resolve Talent Requires Warlock Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.
Shared Vessel Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Mastery by 2%. This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.
Dominant Hand Talent Requires Warlock Increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan to its main target by 20%.
Fel Intellect Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Intellect by 2%.
Practiced Rituals Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Mastery by 2%.
Dreadlash Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 15 When your Dreadstalkers charge into battle, their Dreadbite attack now hits all targets within 8 yards and deals 10% more damage.

Wicked Reaping Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%. Consuming Nightfall feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal (601.005% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to your target. Demonology Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 30%. Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal [(601.005% of Spell Power) * 0.4] Shadow damage to your target.

Quietus Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster. Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls. Affliction Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster. Consuming Nightfall activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

Sataiel's Volition Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Corruption deals damage 25% faster and Haunt grants Nightfall. Demonology Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.
Eternal Hunger Talent Requires Warlock Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.
Imp-erator Talent Requires Warlock Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by 15%.

Implosion Talent Requires Warlock Demonic forces suck 6 of your Wild Imps toward the target, and then cause them to violently explode, dealing (136.382% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards.
Power Siphon Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 25 ly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.
Summon Felguard Talent Requires Warlock Summons a Felguard under your command as a powerful melee combatant.

Shadow of Death Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Your Dark Harvest spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant that each contain a Succulent Soul every 1 sec while channeled. Demonology Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant that each contain a Succulent Soul.
Infernal Rapidity Talent Requires Warlock When your Wild Imps cast Fel Firebolt, they have 10% chance to instantly cast another Fel Firebolt at 200% effectiveness.
Rune of Shadows Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.
Rune of Shadows Talent Requires Warlock Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.
Carnivorous Stalkers Talent Requires Warlock Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.
Carnivorous Stalkers Talent Requires Warlock Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.
Fel Armaments Talent Requires Warlock The cooldown of your Felguard's Felstorm is reduced by 10 sec and damage dealt to your primary demon is reduced by 10%.

Diabolic Ritual Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead. When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies. Demonology Spending a Soul Shard on a damaging spell grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. While Diabolic Ritual is active, each Soul Shard spent on a damaging spell reduces its duration by 1 sec. When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Hand of Gul'dan to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.
Imp Gang Boss Talent Requires Warlock Hand of Gul'dan now empowers 1 of the Wild Imps it summons, increasing its damage dealt by 100%.
Demonic Brutality Talent Requires Warlock Damaging critical strikes dealt by you and your demons deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.
Inner Demons Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 45 You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every 12 sec.

Summon Demonic Tyrant Talent 2% of base mana Requires Warlock Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec . Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active. [ Soulbound Tyrant : Generates . ]
Blighted Maw Talent Requires Warlock The fangs of your Dreadstalkers are coated in corrosive bile, causing Dreadbite to deal additional damage equal to 50% of damage dealt as Plague damage.
Improved Demonic Tactics Talent Requires Warlock Increases the critical strike chance of your primary demon by 50% of your critical strike chance.
Empowered Felstorm Talent Requires Warlock Increases the damage of your Felguard's Felstorm by 20% and its duration by 4.0 sec.
Cloven Souls Talent Requires Warlock Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5 % for 15 sec.

Touch of Rancora Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%. Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec. Demonology Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Hand of Gul'dan by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

effects.target_spell_name: your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn

ranks.description: Secrets of the Coven Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt. Infernal Bolt Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating . Demonology Mother of Chaos empowers your next Shadow Bolt to become Infernal Bolt. Infernal Bolt Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating .

Diabolic Oculi Talent Requires Warlock You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells. Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing (234.62% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Spiteful Reconstitution Talent Requires Warlock Increases Demonbolt damage by 10% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.
Tyrant's Oblation Talent Requires Warlock Your Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

Antoran Armaments Talent Requires Warlock Your Demonic Tyrant is equipped with armor forged within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. While summoned, your Demonic Tyrant now assaults enemies with powerful melee attacks. Burning Cleave Cleaves all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting (96% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Flametouched Talent Requires Warlock Increases the attack speed of your Dreadstalkers by 10% and their critical strike chance by 15%.

Soul-Etched Circles Talent Requires Warlock You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.
Annihilan's Bellow Talent Requires Warlock Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

Cruelty of Kerxan Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Summon Demonic Tyrant grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec. Destruction Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

Infernal Machine Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Demonic Tyrant is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec. Destruction Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.
Infernal Vitality Talent Requires Warlock Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.
Infernal Bulwark Talent Requires Warlock Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

Looks That Kill Talent Requires Warlock Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active. Diabolic Gaze Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing (80% of Spell Power) Chaos damage. Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.
Demonic Knowledge Talent Requires Warlock Hand of Gul'dan has a 5% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.
Demonic Knowledge Talent Requires Warlock Hand of Gul'dan has a 5% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.
Sacrificed Souls Talent Requires Warlock Requires level 50 Shadow Bolt and Demonbolt deal 2% additional damage per demon you have summoned.
Reign of Tyranny Talent Requires Warlock Your Demonic Tyrant lasts an additional 5 sec and extends the duration of your Dreadstalkers by 15 sec when summoned.
Master Summoner Talent Requires Warlock Increases Mastery by 3% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by 0.5 sec.
Demonic Calling Talent Requires Warlock Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.
Demonic Calling Talent Requires Warlock Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.
Flames of Xoroth Talent Requires Warlock Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

Abyssal Dominion Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Summon Demonic Tyrant is empowered, dealing 70% increased damage and increasing the damage of your demons by 20% while active. Destruction Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

Gloom of Nathreza Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells. Demonology Hand of Gul'dan deals 15% increased damage for each Soul Shard spent.

Mind's Eyes Talent Requires Warlock Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

Doom Talent Requires Warlock When Demonbolt consumes a Demonic Core it inflicts impending doom upon the target, dealing (403.121% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds of its target after 20 sec or when removed. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets. Hand of Gul'dan reduces the duration of Doom by 3 sec.
Hellbent Commander Talent Requires Warlock Your demons deal 1.0% increased damage for each demon you control.

Grimoire: Imp Lord Talent Requires Warlock Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned. Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.
Grimoire: Fel Ravager Talent Requires Warlock Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will interrupt their target when summoned. Turns into Spell Lock while on cooldown.
Summon Vilefiend Talent Requires Warlock Call Dreadstalkers also summons a Vilefiend that assists you in combat for 15 sec.

Ruination Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination. Ruination Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 1 Diabolic Imp. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance and is reduced beyond 8 targets. Demonology Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Hand of Gul'dan to become Ruination. Ruination Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Summon Doomguard Talent Requires Warlock Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec. Doom Bolt Volley Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting (413.929% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to each target.

To Hell and Back Talent Requires Warlock Power Siphon and Implosion summon 1 Imp Gang Boss for every 2 Wild Imps sacrificed. Wild Imps summoned this way gain Unstable Soul. Unstable Soul Increases damage done by 50% and Fel Firebolt now jumps to 4 additional targets.
Stabilized Portals Talent Requires Warlock Increases the duration of your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager by 3 sec.

effects.target_spell_name: your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager

ranks.description: Mark of Shatug Talent Requires Warlock Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Gloomhound and learns the following ability: Gloom Slash Tooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional (31.7766% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

Mark of F'harg Talent Requires Warlock Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Charhound and learns the following ability: Infernal Presence Cloaked in the ever-burning flames of the abyss, dealing (15.9865% of Spell Power) Fire damage to enemies within 10 yards every 1 sec.

Dominion of Argus Talent Requires Warlock Summoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 sec, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 sec.

Wicked Reaping Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%. Consuming Nightfall feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal (601.005% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to your target. Demonology Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 30%. Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal [(601.005% of Spell Power) * 0.4] Shadow damage to your target.

Shared Fate Talent Requires Warlock When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts (50.6531% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 1 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
Feast of Souls Talent Requires Warlock When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.
Eternal Servitude Talent Requires Warlock Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.
Gorefiend's Resolve Talent Requires Warlock Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

Necrolyte Teachings Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul damage increased by 20%. Nightfall increases the damage of Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%. Demonology Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

effects.target_spell_name: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%. Demonology Shadow Bolt damage increased

ranks.description: Demoniac's Fervor Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to targets affected by your Unstable Affliction. Demonology Your demonic soul deals 200% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

Sataiel's Volition Talent Requires Warlock Affliction Corruption deals damage 25% faster and Haunt grants Nightfall. Demonology Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

Quietus Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster. Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls. Affliction Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster. Consuming Nightfall activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

Gorebound Fortitude Talent Requires Warlock You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.
Friends In Dark Places Talent Requires Warlock Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing (353.236% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Demonology Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant that each contain a Succulent Soul.
Eternal Hunger Talent Requires Warlock Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.
Shared Vessel Talent Requires Warlock Increases your Mastery by 2%. This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

Manifested Avarice Talent Requires Warlock Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec. Soul Swipe Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing (195.514% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to its target and (130.346% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

Curse of the Satyr Talent Requires Warlock Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr. Curse of the Satyr Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min. Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.
Aura of Enfeeblement Talent Requires Warlock While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

Seeds of Their Demise Talent Requires Warlock Destruction After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains. When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain 2 stacks of Flashpoint. Affliction After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains. When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.
Mark of Xavius Talent Requires Warlock [ Agony : Agony damage increased by 30% / Wither damage increased by 25%.] Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.
Zevrim's Resilience Talent Requires Warlock Dark Pact heals you for (164.583% of Spell Power) every 1 sec while active.
Illhoof's Design Talent Requires Warlock Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

Blackened Soul Talent Requires Warlock Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1. Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

Wither Talent 1.5% of base mana Requires Warlock Destruction Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing (19.8375% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional (296.544% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage over 18 sec . Periodic damage generates Fragment and has a 50% chance to generate an additional 1 on critical strikes. Replaces Immolate. Affliction Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing (19.8375% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional (296.544% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage over 18 sec . Replaces Corruption.

Malevolence Talent 1% of base mana Requires Warlock Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take (1265.51% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6. While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

Mark of Peroth'arn Talent Requires Warlock Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

Xalan's Cruelty Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 5% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources. Affliction Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

Xalan's Ferocity Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 5% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources. Affliction Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.
Hatefury Rituals Talent Requires Warlock Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.
Bleakheart Tactics Talent Requires Warlock Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.
Alzzin's Iniquity Talent Requires Warlock Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.
Devil Fruit Talent Requires Warlock Approximately 1 procs per minute Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

Through the Felvine Talent Requires Warlock Increases the damage of [ Unstable Affliction : Unstable Affliction by 8 / Chaos Bolt by 35]% and [ Seed of Corruption : Seed of Corruption by 4 / Rain of Fire by 6]%. This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

Secrets of the Coven Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt. Infernal Bolt Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating . Demonology Mother of Chaos empowers your next Shadow Bolt to become Infernal Bolt. Infernal Bolt Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating .

Ruination Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination. Ruination Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 1 Diabolic Imp. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance and is reduced beyond 8 targets. Demonology Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Hand of Gul'dan to become Ruination. Ruination Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Abyssal Dominion Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Summon Demonic Tyrant is empowered, dealing 70% increased damage and increasing the damage of your demons by 20% while active. Destruction Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.
Flames of Xoroth Talent Requires Warlock Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

Soul-Etched Circles Talent Requires Warlock You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.
Annihilan's Bellow Talent Requires Warlock Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

Gloom of Nathreza Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells. Demonology Hand of Gul'dan deals 15% increased damage for each Soul Shard spent.

Cruelty of Kerxan Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Summon Demonic Tyrant grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec. Destruction Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

Infernal Machine Talent Requires Warlock Demonology Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Demonic Tyrant is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec. Destruction Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.
Cloven Souls Talent Requires Warlock Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5 % for 15 sec.
Infernal Vitality Talent Requires Warlock Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.
Infernal Bulwark Talent Requires Warlock Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

Diabolic Ritual Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead. When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies. Demonology Spending a Soul Shard on a damaging spell grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. While Diabolic Ritual is active, each Soul Shard spent on a damaging spell reduces its duration by 1 sec. When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Hand of Gul'dan to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

Touch of Rancora Talent Requires Warlock Destruction Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%. Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec. Demonology Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Hand of Gul'dan by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

effects.target_spell_name: your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn

ranks.description: Mind's Eyes Talent Requires Warlock Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

Looks That Kill Talent Requires Warlock Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active. Diabolic Gaze Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing (80% of Spell Power) Chaos damage. Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

Diabolic Oculi Talent Requires Warlock You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells. Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing (234.62% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
